title: tarenna australis
intro:
Tarenna australis, also known as the Red Back Tarenna, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, native to the tropical regions of the Pacific Islands.

This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties, making it useful for treating various health conditions.

The health benefits of Tarenna australis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity, which can help to prevent infections and promote overall well-being.

Tarenna australis is typically prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential applications.
